articles.title: Ronda Rousey vs Gina Carano Emotional Embrace 😢
articles.description: Ronda Rousey vs Gina Carano EMOTIONAL EMBRACE After 17-Second Finish 😢🥊 After defeating Gina Carano by armbar in just 17 seconds, Ronda Rousey shared an emotional moment with the woman she says inspired her MMA journey ❤️ Rousey called Gina her “hero” leading into the fight… and the respect between them was undeniable after the finish. 👇 Is this it for both fighters? articles.title: Gina Carano CEREMONIAL WEIGH 100 Pounds
articles.description: Gina Carano Lost 100 POUNDS for Ronda Rousey Fight 😳🔥 Gina Carano revealed she lost an incredible 100 pounds to make the fight with Ronda Rousey happen 👀🔥 The contract weight was 145… but Gina came in even lighter at 141.4 pounds 😳 That level of discipline and commitment has fans shocked ahead of one of the biggest women’s combat sports fights ever. 🥊 👇 Does this change how dangerous you think Gina will be on fight night?
